decision: Add Codex + Copilot transcript support via lib/transcripts providers; session ids namespaced as `${tool}:${sessionId}` and the detail route dispatches parsing by prefix (bare ids default to Claude for back-compat).
rationale: Operator named claude+codex+copilot; both are JSONL and verifiable against real on-disk files. Keeps the working Claude path intact and isolates each provider so one tool failing never breaks the list.
alternatives: Full rewrite of the Claude route into a provider (rejected: higher regression risk on the working path); ?tool= query param instead of id prefix (rejected: id prefix is self-contained through the UI).

decision: Defer OpenCode transcript support to a follow-up task.
rationale: OpenCode uses a structured 3-level JSON store (session→message→part) requiring a heavier join than the JSONL tools; operator scope was claude+codex+copilot.
alternatives: Implement now (deferred to bound this PR).

decision: Harden per Codex review: reject path-traversal session ids in the finders (isSafeSessionId), keep listing Codex/Copilot even when ~/.claude is absent, and guard parsers against null/non-object lines and non-array toolRequests.
rationale: findCopilotSessionFile joined a URL-supplied id into a path (traversal); the list early-returned when Claude was missing (hiding other tools); parsers could throw on malformed-but-valid JSON.

decision: Codex r7 review: contain untrusted Claude sessions-index.json `fullPath` to the configured projects dir (isPathWithin via realpathSync+relative) in BOTH the detail route's findSessionFile and the list route before stat()/read; add typeof===string guards on untrusted timestamp/toolName/toolId/thinking/text in the codex/copilot/Claude parsers; keep the detail-view full readFile (bounded to one session) with an explaining comment.
rationale: A crafted index entry's fullPath (or its `..`-bearing /host-claude regex translation) was existsSync-checked then read with no containment, enabling arbitrary host-file reads (path traversal, M1). Untrusted JSON string fields flowed unguarded into typed TranscriptMessage fields (S2/S3/S4).
alternatives: startsWith(base+sep) containment (rejected: trailing-sep/case pitfalls vs realpath+relative); stream the detail read (rejected: detail renders the whole session, so a single bounded full read is acceptable, S1).
